No-Code App Builder No-Code App Builders let users create apps with drag-and-drop interfaces. They allow faster prototyping and development without programming skills.

No-Code Website Builder No-Code Website Builders offer simple interfaces for creating professional websites. They are designed for entrepreneurs, small businesses, and individuals who need an online presence quickly.
Apps for kids Apps for kids gather safe, kid-friendly tools for learning, stories, journaling, and focus. Expect AI tutors, bedtime tales, pen-pal letters, and screen-time help.
Family Care Family Care gathers tools for home life: organize schedules, protect kids online, preserve memories, teach safety, and share moments—built for busy households.
Pregnancy apps Pregnancy apps guide expecting parents through prenatal care: track cycles to bump, chat with doulas, find baby names, manage health, and join supportive communities.
Analytics Databases Analytics Databases are optimized for running fast queries on large datasets. They support dashboards, BI tools, and advanced analytical workloads.

Business intelligence software Business Intelligence (BI) tools help startups turn raw data into clear, actionable decisions — fast. They bring together metrics from across your stack, surface trends you’d otherwise miss, and give teams a shared source of truth to move with confidence.

But “BI for startups” isn’t just about charts and dashboards. It’s about speed. The best BI tools help you answer questions as quickly as you think of them, adapt as your product and data evolve, and support experimentation without weeks of setup or specialized analysts. Modern evolutions of the product are starting to feel more like an AI Data Analyst, turning natural language queries into insights in moments instead of days.
Data visualization tools Data visualization tools turn raw data into clear charts, maps, and dashboards. They help teams explore trends, track behavior, and share insights across products.
Shopping Discover tools that make buying smarter: price trackers, coupon finders, second-hand guides, wishlists, and niche markets—built for savvy, budget-aware shoppers.
